query: Could you help me design a one-week travel itinerary departing from Devils Lake and heading to Colorado, covering a total of 3 cities? The travel dates are set between March 22nd and March 28th, 2022. This trip is for a single person with a budget of $3,500.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Devils Lake to Alamosa, duration: 17 hours 26 mins, distance: 1,811 km, cost: 90

plan.attraction: San Luis Valley Museum; Rio Grande Farm Park; Cole Park; Los Caminos Antiguos Scenic Byway: Alamosa Entrance; Carroll Park; Alamosa Archery Range; Alamosa Riparian Park; Alamosa Sub; Boyd Park; Alamosa National Wildlife Refuge and Visitor Center; Toivo Malm Trail System; Alamosa Colorado Welcome Center;
plan.accommodation: Comfortable studio suite in midtown Manhattan

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Alamosa to Grand Junction, duration: 4 hours 29 mins, distance: 396 km, cost: 19

plan.attraction: Museum of the West, Museums of Western Colorado; Eureka! McConnell Science Museum; Bananas Fun Park; Western Colorado Botanical Gardens; Canyon View Park; Eagle Rim Park; Cross Orchards Historic Site, Museums of Western Colorado; James M. Robb - Colorado River State Park; Long Family Memorial Park; James M. Robb - Colorado River State Park Connected Lakes Section; Attractions Grand Junction!!; Palisade Tourism; Rocket Park; Welcome To Grand Junction Mural; Walter Walker State Wildlife Area; Visit Grand Junction; Hawthorne Park; Columbine Park; Red Canyon Overlook; Lincoln Park;
plan.accommodation: Cool room Manhattan - Sleeps up to 3 guests

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Grand Junction to Gunnison, duration: 2 hours 27 mins, distance: 200 km, cost: 10

plan.attraction: I.O.O.F. Park; Jorgensen Park; Gunnison Pioneer Museum; Gunnison Valley Observatory; Hartman Rocks; Black Canyon of the Gunnison National Park; West Tomichi River Park; Gunnison State Wildlife Area;
plan.accommodation: Full-size loft bed in East Village

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Gunnison to Devils Lake, duration: 17 hours 30 mins, distance: 1,881 km, cost: 94
